app.description: Code Puppy CN - bilingual code generation agent
help.shell_desc: Run a shell command directly (e.g., !git status)
command.cn_setup_desc: Browse and add supported China-region models
commands.model: Switch or inspect the active model
commands.agent: Switch or inspect the active agent
commands.session: Show or manage the current session
commands.clear: Clear conversation history and rotate the autosave session
commands.colors: Configure banner colors for tool output
commands.compact: Summarize and compact the current chat history
commands.dump_context: Save the current message history to a file
commands.generate-pr-description: Generate a comprehensive pull request description
commands.goal: Retry a task until all configured judges approve it
commands.load_context: Load message history from a file
commands.model_settings: Configure settings for an individual model
commands.paste: Paste an image from the clipboard
commands.pin_model: Pin a model to an agent
commands.truncate: Keep only the most recent messages
commands.uc: Browse and manage Universal Constructor tools
commands.wiggum: Repeat the same prompt when the agent finishes
commands.wiggum_stop: Stop Wiggum or goal loop mode
commands.prompt_newline: Toggle user input onto a new line below the prompt
commands.pop: Delete recent messages and broken tool-call fragments
commands.copilot-login: Authenticate with GitHub Copilot in a browser
commands.copilot-status: Show GitHub Copilot authentication and models
commands.copilot-logout: Remove Copilot tokens and registered models
commands.ollama-setup: Pull and register an Ollama model
commands.claude-code-auth: Authenticate with Claude Code and import models
commands.claude-code-status: Show Claude Code authentication and models
commands.claude-code-logout: Remove Claude Code tokens and imported models
commands.claude-code-fast: Toggle fast mode for the active Claude Code model
commands.kennel: Search and manage local Puppy Kennel memory
commands.emoji-filter: Show or toggle the emoji filter
commands.hooks: Manage global and project Claude Code hooks
commands.woof: Ask the agent for a dog fact or another prompt
commands.review-pr: Review a GitHub pull request using gh
commands.chatgpt-auth: Authenticate with ChatGPT and import models
commands.chatgpt-logout: Remove ChatGPT tokens and imported models
commands.synthetic-status: Show Synthetic quota and renewal time
commands.switch-agent: Switch agent and resume its last terminal session
commands.foundry-status: Show Azure AI Foundry configuration status
commands.foundry-remove: Remove Azure AI Foundry model configurations
commands.theme: Choose a banner and content color theme
commands.cn-setup: Browse and add supported China-region models
commands.create-hook: Get help creating Code Puppy hooks
commands.skills: Browse, enable, disable, or install agent skills
commands.code-fix: Inspect a project, fix a defect, run tests, and summarize
commands.bedrock-status: Show AWS Bedrock authentication and configuration
cn_setup.title: China-region model setup
doctor.title: Code Puppy CN diagnostics
